title: adesmia reclinata
intro: Adesmia reclinata, also known as the climbing bean or thorny bean, is a perennial climbing plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Adesmia reclinata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Adesmia reclinata is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it may also be used in the form of tinctures, salves, or poultices.
